projectDescription: A lightweight three-file protocol kit for maintaining a controlled, operator-approved shared memory layer of recurring best practices in Codex AI sessions.
keyFeatures: Three-file layered protocol: entry point, runtime store, and compiler
Operator-gated practice promotion – no automatic memory capture
Strict authority hierarchy below operator instructions and AGENTS.md
Structured practice block schema (id, status, scope, kind, applies_when, goal, do, avoid)
Practice lifecycle management: promote, revise, deprecate, remove
Lightweight runtime load – compiler only activated during formation work
Manual maintenance allowed following documented block shape and promotion rules
Compatible with any Codex environment that can read plain-text instruction files
publicApiSurface: shared-best-practice-compiler.txt – practice formation and evaluation layer
Practice block fields: id (PNNN), status, scope, kind, applies_when, goal, do, avoid
Kind values: environment, orientation, operation, verification
Lifecycle transitions: promote, revise, deprecate, remove, reject
Proposal shape: candidate, kind, scope, rationale, proposed block
